result:
Pushed. Here's what was built:

**New files:**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `public/sw.js` | Service worker: cache-first for `/_next/static/*`, network-first for `/api/*`, stale-while-revalidate for HTML pages |
| `public/manifest.json` | PWA manifest: standalone display, portrait, dark theme, pirate anchor icons |
| `public/icon-192.svg` / `icon-512.svg` | Gold anchor on navy background, SVG scales to any density |
| `lib/idb.ts` | IndexedDB wrapper ŌĆö `pending_sync` store queues offline progress saves |
| `components/PWAProvider.tsx` | Registers SW, captures `beforeinstallprompt`, tracks online/offline, auto-drains queue on reconnect via `/api/progress/sync` |
| `components/OnlineStatus.tsx` | Green/red pill shown in the app header |
| `app/api/progress/sync/route.ts` | Bulk sync endpoint ŌĆö applies all queued offline progress in one call |

**Modified:**
- `app/layout.tsx` ŌĆö adds manifest link, `appleWebApp` meta, `themeColor` in viewport, wraps app in `PWAProvider`
- `app/(app)/layout.tsx` ŌĆö adds `OnlineStatus` badge next to logout button
- `components/HeapGame.tsx` ŌĆö catches failed API saves and queues to IDB instead of silently dropping
- `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` ŌĆö shows "Install App" button when `beforeinstallprompt` fires, shows "Added to home screen!" on success

**To test offline:** DevTools ŌåÆ Application ŌåÆ Service Workers ŌåÆ check Offline ŌåÆ navigate to `/map`, play a heap ŌĆö progress queues locally ŌåÆ uncheck Offline ŌåÆ sync fires automatically.
